member.name: T:nxm.biz.erp.core.connector.erp_data_service_
member.summary: abstract base utility class simplifying implementation of ierp_data_service

member.name: P:nxm.biz.erp.core.connector.erp_data_service_.options
member.summary: service configuration options, preset values ('current warehouse' etc.) and request parameters

member.name: M:nxm.biz.erp.core.connector.erp_data_service_.get_customer_details(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context)
member.summary: return customer details for order set in options

member.name: M:nxm.biz.erp.core.connector.erp_data_service_.get_customer_transactions(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context)
member.summary: return list of customer due debts for given customer with use criteria given in options

member.name: M:nxm.biz.erp.core.connector.erp_data_service_.get_sales_orders(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context)
member.summary: return list of sales orders matching filtering criteria given in options

member.name: M:nxm.biz.erp.core.connector.erp_data_service_.get_sales_order_details(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context)
member.summary: return sales order details for order set in options

member.name: M:nxm.biz.erp.core.connector.erp_data_service_.get_warehouse_stock(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context)
member.summary: return list of warehouses' stocks for given products with use criteria given in options

member.name: P:nxm.biz.erp.core.connector.ierp_data_service.options
member.summary: service configuration options, preset values ('current warehouse' etc.) and request parameters

member.name: M:nxm.biz.erp.core.connector.ierp_data_service.get_sales_orders(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context)
member.summary: return list of sales orders matching filtering criteria given in options

member.name: M:nxm.biz.erp.core.connector.ierp_data_service.get_sales_order_lines(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context)
member.summary: return sales order lines order given in options

member.name: M:nxm.biz.erp.core.connector.ierp_data_service.get_sales_order_details(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context)
member.summary: return sales order details for order set in options

member.name: M:nxm.biz.erp.core.connector.ierp_data_service.process_sales_order(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context)
member.summary: perform action on given sales order

member.name: M:nxm.biz.erp.core.connector.ierp_data_service.get_customer_transactions(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context)
member.summary: return list of customer transaction for given customer with use criteria given in options

member.name: M:nxm.biz.erp.core.connector.ierp_data_service.get_warehouse_stock(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context)
member.summary: return list of warehouses' stocks for given products with use criteria given in options
